name: jean-claude
description: Shows Claude.ai usage limits in the VS Code status bar
author: Tomas Janu

enumDescriptions: Auto-detect OAuth token from Claude Code credentials, fall back to session cookie
jeanClaude.authMethod.description: Authentication method for fetching usage data

jeanClaude.sessionKey.description: Session key cookie from claude.ai (required if authMethod is 'cookie')

jeanClaude.notificationSound.enabled.description: Play a sound when Claude Code asks a question or finishes a task in the terminal

jeanClaude.notificationSound.onQuestion.description: Play a sound when Claude Code asks for user input (e.g. tool approval)

jeanClaude.notificationSound.onTaskCompl.description: Play a sound when Claude Code finishes a task (command exits)
